arabic:
عن عائشة رَضِيَ اللهُ عنها، قالت: سَمِعْتُ رسولَ الله - صلى الله عليه وسلم - يقولُ: 
"لا صَلاَةَ بِحَضْرَةِ طَعَامٍ، وَلاَ وَهُوَ يُدَافِعُهُ الأَخْبَثَانِ". ((رواه مسلم‏)) ‏

english.narrator: 'Aishah (May Allah be pleased with her) said:
english.text: I heard the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) saying, "No Salat (prayer) should be performed when the food has been served, nor should it be performed when a person is in need of relieving himself.".

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
